name: datapusher-plus: alert on consecutive failures
description: Fires once when the same DataPusher+ resource fails 3 times within an hour. Wire the action to your Slack/Pagerduty webhook in the Prefect UI before applying.

actions.subject: DataPusher+ failed 3x for {{ event.related.ckan.resource.id }}
actions.body: Resource {{ event.related.ckan.resource.id }} failed 3 times in the past hour. Open the flow run: {{ event.resource.id }}
